_comment: Watch fail-closed permission posture (docs/always-on-agent-research.md §3.2). Deploys to /Users/jefe/watch/.claude/settings.json. Architecture (r2 fold): fail-closed by REMOVING read surfaces, not by per-path denies. defaultMode=dontAsk (the valid fail-closed mode; 'deny' is INVALID and would make Claude reject this whole file). allow is EMPTY: the PreToolUse dispatch-gate hook is the SOLE allow-er of the two read wrappers, the SOLE ask-er of a valid mxr dispatch, and DEFAULT-DENIES every other Bash command (so read-only Bash like cat/grep/ls cannot exfil around the fence — a hook deny overrides dontAsk's read-only auto-allow). The deny list uses BARE tool names to remove the file-reading tools from Claude's context ENTIRELY (per docs, a bare-name deny removes the tool), so the ONLY read path is read-inbox/mxr-read (both fenced). MCP is disabled at launch via CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MCP=1 (rc-wrapper.sh); mcp__* here is belt. Edit the hook path if the checkout is elsewhere.
